prompt: Our RAG chatbot keeps answering with info from a wiki page we deleted three weeks ago, and sometimes gives contradictory answers. Is there a principled way to handle freshness and stale knowledge for agent context?

assertions.text: Distinguishes the deleted-page-still-served problem from the contradiction/versioning problem
Provides a freshness policy with a maxAge/TTL and a stale action per source
States the principle of never serving expired content silently (explicit staleness or fail-closed)
Describes a reconciliation / sweep / continuous-monitoring mechanism to purge or re-sync
Names discrete freshness states (e.g. fresh / stale / expired / conflicted)
